caption: head to my stories for a quick little review of my @polene_paris bag 🤎 I had received a few requests to do one & it’s definitely the bag I wear the most right now. such good quality, the perfect size for my needs, and they have many other beautiful color options too 👜 anywho! after work today I spent the rest of the afternoon/early evening packaging up your Poshmark orders! 📦 we shipped half of them until we had to go to the post office for more boxes, so the other half will go out tmro! thanks to all who shopped and helped me clear my closet 😘😘 // #poleneparis #bagreview

caption:
How’s your Saturday night ⚡️ 

Spending this evening at @talkingstickresort and having the time of my life. From top to bottom, literally every floor, it’s experiential and absolutely outstanding. Have you visited here? Definitely make a reservation at Orange Sky - the rooftop alone is outstanding, but add the outstanding food + drinks and trust me, you’ll be happy.

PS: my shoes were $1 from @goodwillaz - oh wait, so was my whole outfit 😜 #talkingstickresort

caption:
Nano influencer — 1-10k izləyicisi olan, lakin auditoriyası ilə yüksək engagement quran mikro kontent yaradıcıdır. Onlar məhsulları daha səmimi, real və yaxın üslubla tanıdırlar. Brendlər üçün bu influencerlər daha sərfəli, hədəfli və effektiv reklam imkanı yaradır.
(10 aprel baş tutacaq onlayn vebinarda daha çoxunu danışacağıq✅)

Niyə nano-influencerlər dəyərlidir?

~Auditoriya aktiv və etibarlıdır

~Reklam kontenti daha təbii görünür

~Brendlər üçün az büdcə ,yüksək nəticə verir

~Niş mövzuda daha peşəkar və yaxın imic yaradırlar

Nano-influencer hansı sahələrdə işləyə bilər?
Beauty, fashion, lifestyle, food, travel, education, tech, bookblog, fitness və s. — hər sahədən ola bilər, əsas olan aktivlik + keyfiyyətli kontentdir.

Nano-influencer, mikro influencer nədir, mikro bloger kimdir, Azərbaycan influencerləri, nano influencer, engagement nədir, influencer marketing, reklama uyğun influencer, azərbaycan smm, instagram influencer 2025, brendlərlə əməkdaşlıq, sosial media trendləri, effektiv reklam Instagram, kontent yaradıcıları.

alt: Photo by Hasti ZaheDi on July 07, 2026. May be a selfie of one or more people, blonde hair, makeup, eyeliner and text.

caption:
I get asked this question a lot.

The truth is, I don’t think Baku is any different from most cities around the world when it comes to staying safe while traveling.

Use reputable booking platforms, order taxis through apps, confirm prices before agreeing to services, and check reviews before you go somewhere.

Honestly, what stands out to me most about Baku isn’t scams—it’s how safe, welcoming, and genuinely helpful people are.

I’ve lived in different countries, traveled quite a bit, and Baku remains one of the safest cities I’ve personally experienced.

These tips aren’t really “Baku tips.”

They’re just good travel habits that happen to work here too. 🇦🇿

What advice would you add for someone visiting Baku for the first time? 👇

#Baku #Azerbaijan #VisitAzerbaijan #BakuTravel #

How no to get scammed in Baku - just go to Armenia 🇦🇲

This is a very small thing but we were scammed by a local small street vendor on nizami street. We asked the price he said 7 manat but when we got our nuts and paid 7 he said no it's for 15 manat I already told you before 😂 we didn't argue and gave him cause it was not a big thing and it was our first day. Later we were told it's very common here later we were careful from street vendors
This is really helpful. We’re promoting Azerbaijan travel in Pakistan and really appreciate these tips!

childPosts.alt: Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be a meme of text.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be a meme of street and text that says '1get asked this a lot. wEeTWww ያህኒባንጣ 中 Honestly, I think Baku follows the same rules as almost any city in the world. But if you're visiting for the first time, here are a are few things I'd recommend.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'AUseTaxiApps Use Taxi Apps Stick to Bolt or to Yango. Choose Comfort, Premium, or Business. The price difference is is usually small, but the cars are typically newer and the overall experience tends to more comfortable and predictable.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of text that says '田用 用 Book Accommodation HMA Wisely Use Booking.com, Airbnb, or other reputable platforms. Read recent reviews, check the host's history, and avoid sending money outside the platform. If someone asks you to cancel your booking and pay them directly, that's usually a red flag.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'Confirm Prices Up Front Private tours, airport transfers, beauty services, markets, excursions... Ask for the final price before agreeing. 日對立で It's awkward for 10 seconds and can save you a lot later.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'lo Always Ask for the Menu If prices aren't clearly listed, ask. say yes And don't automatically t the "special,' "chef's recommendation," or dishes that aren't on the menu without checking the price first.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of map, magazine and text that says 'Read Recent Reviews Not the reviews from 2022. The recent ones. Google Maps can save you from from overpriced restaurants, questionable tours, and disappointing experiences.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of money, cash machine, card and text that says '圓室 Exchange Money at Official Places Use banks, official exchange offices, or ATMs attached to banks. Avoid random currency exchange offers. 오주로 民盟日作動動 F K'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be a meme of text that says 'If Someone Is Pushing Too Hard, Walk Away Whether it's a shop, a tour, or a service. Good businesses don't need to pressure you.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be a meme of text that says 'When in Doubt, Ask Ask your hotel, host, locals, or or even expats. People in Baku are usually incredibly willing to help. CIHT'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be an image of magazine, pool and text that says 'The Good News? Baku is genuinely one of the safest cities I've lived in. - People are welcoming, respectful, and helpful. Most visitors won't encounter any anyissues issues at all.'.

Photo by Anya Shvygar on June 22, 2026. May be a meme of text that says 'Most of these aren't "Baku tips." They're just "how to travel anywhere in the world" tips. Use common sense, stay aware, and enjoy one of the friendliest cities you'll you'llvisit. visit. .yン.. ER'.

caption:
🍋Day8 / Limone sul Garda

ガルダ湖畔の街、リモーネスルガルダに1泊したよ。
昨夜涼しくなってからビュースポットの下見して、
今朝、この日のために買ったレモン柄ワンピースを着て
レモンのイヤリングを身に付け、三脚セルフィーした📸
酷暑の中、太陽ジリジリで焦げるかと思った😂
頑張った甲斐あり、なかなか上手く撮れたではないか💛🥰

ここGoogleマップではView Spotってなってるけど
歩道がない道だからこんな綺麗な眺めなのに全然人が来ない。
おかげさまで1人で納得出来るまで撮れたよ✨

リアルタイムはリモーネからバス乗り継いで
ブレシアから電車乗ったんだけど、
一駅進んだところで急に停まって暑い外に放り出され
なす術なくただ待ち続けて2時間😂
ミラノ行きの電車は全てキャンセル。
DBの遅延に慣れてる＋今日は急いでないから
なんとか待ててるけど先が見えないまま待つのはしんどい🤷‍♀️

🗓️June 25, 2026

#limonesulgarda #lagodigarda #lakegarda #italia #リモーネスルガルダ
